EmailTemplate.description: Email to use to welcome a new OTT Hot Lead (with WhatsApp).
EmailTemplate.name: OTT Welcome (WhatsApp) Email_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: I’ve got your call back request
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thanks for getting in touch via On the Tools.
My name is {!User.FirstName} and I’ll be giving you a call to run through your business insurance needs.
So, you know when to expect my call - our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday. Need me to call at a specific time? Book a call slot - https://calendly.com/d/crv2-4cb-zcj/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-on-the-tools
Not able to answer calls during the day? Send me a message on WhatsApp using 07917 515428 and I’ll contact you via message instead.
Alternatively, contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to catching up with you soon!
Thanks,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
